items.title: Players to limit media at Wimbledon amid protest
items.summary: Top tennis players at Wimbledon will extend their protest over prize money by limiting their media appearances at the grass-court Grand Slam tournament next week.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
